import React from "react"; const NutritionInfo = () => { return (

Nutrition Information

Learn about calories, macronutrients, micronutrients, and how they support a healthy lifestyle.

{/* MAIN SECTIONS */}
{/* Calories */}

🔥 Calories

Calories provide energy for essential body functions such as breathing, digestion, and activity.

{/* Macros */}

🍽 Macros

  • Proteins repair and build tissues.
  • Carbs provide quick energy.
  • Fats support hormones and brain function.
{/* Micronutrients */}

🧪 Micronutrients

Vitamins & minerals support immunity, strengthen bones, and help regulate metabolism.

{/* FOOD TABLE */}

Common Foods & Their Nutrition

{[ ["Apple (1 medium)", 95, 0.5, 25, 0.3], ["Banana (1 medium)", 105, 1.3, 27, 0.4], ["Chicken Breast (100g)", 165, 31, 0, 3.6], ["Rice (1 cup cooked)", 206, 4.3, 45, 0.4], ["Almonds (10 pcs)", 70, 2.6, 2.5, 6] ].map(([food, cal, p, c, f], i) => ( ))}
Food Calories Proteins (g) Carbs (g) Fats (g)
{food} {cal} {p} {c} {f}

); }; export default NutritionInfo;
